name: nested_inner_own_span
grammar:
start: "(" inner ")"
inner: A
A: /caf./
%import common.WS
%ignore WS

name: expand1_collapse
grammar:
start: "(" b ")"
?b: A
A: /caf./
%import common.WS
%ignore WS

name: expand1_keeps_wrapper
grammar:
start: "(" b ")"
?b: A C
A: /caf./
C: /c/
%import common.WS
%ignore WS

name: two_kept_kids
grammar:
start: "(" A B ")"
A: /a/
B: /b/
%import common.WS
%ignore WS

name: star_items_in_brackets
grammar:
start: "[" item* "]"
item: A
A: /a/
%import common.WS
%ignore WS

name: two_empties_between_tokens
grammar:
start: "a" e f "b"
e:
f:
%import common.WS
%ignore WS

name: nested_empty_widened_by_outer_punct
grammar:
start: "(" mid ")"
mid: e
e:
%import common.WS
%ignore WS

name: empty_expand1_keeps_positionless
grammar:
start: "a" w "b"
?w: e
e:
%import common.WS
%ignore WS

name: nullable_optional_absent
grammar:
start: "a" n "b"
n: c?
c: "x"
%import common.WS
%ignore WS
